name: style-switcher
description: Modular style snippets and persona recipes for Claude Code. Twelve shipped persona recipes (Daredevil, Jaded IT, Reluctant, Chatty, Philosophical, Operational, Dubious, Hyper Creative, Approval Needed, Visionary, Claude FM, Claude Bouncer), each with a banner image and sound effect. Two apply targets: a managed block inside ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, or repo-sandbox mode that holds the user CLAUDE.md aside and drops the persona into <cwd>/CLAUDE.md for risk-free play.
